name: Chicken Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the marinade ingredients: yogurt, coriander, turmeric, cumin, chiles, fenugreek seed, garlic, and ginger.
2. Marinate the chickens in the mixture overnight.
3. Braise the marinated chickens in liquid until tender.
4. Alternatively, drain the excess liquid and roast the chickens in the oven.
